extortion.description: [AI generated] Peruvian Connection is a high-end fashion retailer that specializes in luxurious alpaca wool and pima cotton clothing and accessories for women. Founded in 1976, the company blends modern, bohemian styles with traditional Andean knitting techniques. Its offerings include sweaters, dresses, skirts, and jewelry, among others. Peruvian Connection operates both online and through physical stores around the world.
